sub_modules.fp32_q15_quantizer: Converts packed IEEE-754 FP32 matrix inputs into clamped quantized integer values using a Q15 scale and zero-point.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_mac: Computes the VLEN by VLEN integer GEMM accumulator by subtracting zero-points and summing K products.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantizer: Converts INT32 accumulators back to packed IEEE-754 FP32 using the product of the two Q15 scale values.
